enrichment.short_description: Yoast SEO is a WordPress plugin providing real-time on-page content analysis, technical SEO automation, and AI-assisted titles and meta descriptions.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Yoast SEO for WordPress: real-time content analysis, technical SEO automation, and AI-powered titles and meta descriptions.

features.title: Real-time content analysis
features.description: Analyzes readability and SEO of content as you write, with immediate feedback.

features.title: AI-generated titles and descriptions
features.description: Uses AI to generate optimized page titles and meta descriptions.

features.title: Technical SEO automation
features.description: Automatically handles technical SEO best practices, redirects, and internal link suggestions.

features.title: Add-on modules
features.description: Optional Local SEO, News SEO, and Video SEO modules for specialized content types.

features.title: Multi-platform availability
features.description: Offered as a WordPress plugin, WooCommerce bundle, Shopify app, and Google Docs add-on.

features.title: AI+ brand monitoring
features.description: The AI+ tier tracks brand mentions across ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, and Claude.

pros: Free WordPress plugin available
Long-established, widely used WordPress SEO plugin
Premium bundles Local SEO, Video SEO, and News SEO modules
24/7 expert support included with Premium
cons: Premium plan is limited to the WordPress/WooCommerce/Shopify ecosystem, not a standalone SEO tool
AI+ tier costs substantially more (€358.80/year) than base Premium
Each Premium subscription covers only one domain

faqs.question: Is Yoast SEO free?
faqs.answer: Yes, a free WordPress plugin is available; Premium starts at €118.80/year for additional features.

faqs.question: Does Yoast SEO support WooCommerce and Shopify?
faqs.answer: Yes, there's a WooCommerce SEO bundle (€178.80/year) and a separate Shopify app ($19/month with a 14-day free trial).

faqs.question: What does the AI+ package include?
faqs.answer: The AI+ package (€358.80/year) adds AI-generated titles/descriptions and brand-mention monitoring across AI platforms like ChatGPT and Claude.

faqs.question: Is Yoast available outside WordPress?
faqs.answer: Yes, Yoast also offers a Google Docs add-on and a Shopify app in addition to its core WordPress plugin.

use_cases.title: WordPress on-page SEO
use_cases.description: Guides content editing with real-time SEO and readability checks.

use_cases.title: WooCommerce product optimization
use_cases.description: Optimizes product and category pages for search.

use_cases.title: Shopify SEO
use_cases.description: Adds SEO analysis and metadata tools to Shopify stores.

features: Core on-page SEO analysis for WordPress
Optimize for up to 5 keywords per page
Includes Local SEO, Video SEO, and News SEO plugins
Premium features plus AI brand-mention monitoring across ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, and Claude
SEO analysis and metadata tools for Shopify

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Yoast SEO?
paragraphs: Yoast SEO is an SEO plugin, originally built for WordPress, that gives real-time feedback on content readability and on-page optimization while automating technical SEO tasks like redirects and internal linking.

Beyond the core WordPress plugin, Yoast offers add-ons for WooCommerce, Shopify, and Google Docs, plus optional Local, News, and Video SEO modules and an AI+ tier for AI-generated metadata and brand monitoring.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Yoast SEO is for
paragraphs: Yoast SEO suits WordPress site owners, bloggers, and WooCommerce or Shopify merchants who want guided on-page SEO without manually managing technical details like redirects and schema.

enrichment.short_description: All in One SEO (AIOSEO) is a WordPress plugin offering on-page optimization, automated technical SEO, and an AI content assistant.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: AIOSEO is a WordPress SEO plugin with TruSEO on-page analysis, automatic schema and sitemaps, and an AI content assistant.

features.title: TruSEO analysis
features.description: Gives an actionable on-page SEO checklist for every page and post.

features.title: Automated technical SEO
features.description: Generates XML sitemaps, monitors 404 errors, and adds schema markup without coding.

features.title: Link Assistant
features.description: Suggests internal linking opportunities across the site (Pro/Elite).

features.title: AI Assistant
features.description: Helps generate and rewrite content, titles, and images using AI credits.

features.title: WooCommerce SEO module
features.description: Dedicated tools for optimizing WooCommerce product pages.

features.title: Local SEO module
features.description: Manages business hours, multiple locations, and Google Maps data.

pros: Free Lite version available on WordPress.org
Used by over 3 million websites
Combines technical SEO, schema, and AI tools in one plugin
14-day money-back guarantee on paid plans
cons: WordPress-only, not usable on other platforms
Link Assistant and Redirection Manager require Pro or Elite tiers
AI Credits are capped per plan and can run out on higher-volume sites

faqs.question: Is there a free version of AIOSEO?
faqs.answer: Yes, a free "Lite" version exists; paid Basic, Plus, Pro, and Elite tiers add more features and site coverage.

faqs.question: How many websites can I use AIOSEO on?
faqs.answer: Plans range from 1 website (Basic) up to 100 websites (Elite).

faqs.question: Does AIOSEO include AI content tools?
faqs.answer: Yes, each plan includes a set number of AI Credits for the AI Assistant, Content Generator, and Image Generator.

faqs.question: Is there a refund guarantee?
faqs.answer: AIOSEO offers a 14-day money-back guarantee.

use_cases.title: On-page SEO guidance
use_cases.description: Gives step-by-step SEO checklists while editing WordPress content.

use_cases.title: Multi-site agency management
use_cases.description: Manages SEO across many client WordPress sites from one plugin.

use_cases.title: WooCommerce optimization
use_cases.description: Optimizes product and category pages for search.

features: Essential SEO tools, schema markup, WooCommerce optimization

long_form_blocks.heading: What is All in One SEO?
paragraphs: All in One SEO (AIOSEO) is a WordPress plugin that combines on-page optimization (TruSEO checklists), automated technical SEO (sitemaps, schema, 404 handling), and an AI Assistant for content and image generation.
Paid tiers scale from a single site up to 100 sites, adding features like Link Assistant, advanced redirects, and client management as you move up.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who AIOSEO is for
paragraphs: AIOSEO fits WordPress site owners and agencies who want an all-in-one SEO plugin covering on-page checks, technical SEO automation, and AI-assisted content, without needing separate tools.

enrichment.short_description: LinkWhisper is a WordPress plugin that uses AI to suggest internal links, detect orphan pages, and (in its premium tier) automate bulk internal linking.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: LinkWhisper is a WordPress plugin that uses AI to find internal linking opportunities, spot orphan pages, and automate bulk linking.

features.title: AI link suggestions
features.description: Real-time AI-powered internal link suggestions inside the WordPress editor.

features.title: Orphan page detection
features.description: Identifies posts and pages that have zero internal links pointing to them.

features.title: Link reports
features.description: Reporting dashboard showing internal link distribution across the site.

features.title: Bulk auto-linking
features.description: Premium tier can automatically add internal links in bulk based on target keywords.

features.title: Broken link detection
features.description: Premium tier detects and reports broken internal links.

features.title: SEO plugin integrations
features.description: Integrates with Yoast SEO, Rank Math, and other SEO plugins.

pros: Free version available on WordPress.org with core AI link suggestions
30,000+ active installs and a 4.1/5 rating (146 reviews) on WordPress.org
Automatically detects orphan pages and broken links
Works alongside other major SEO plugins like Yoast and Rank Math
cons: Bulk auto-linking, broken link detection, and cross-site linking are Premium-only
WordPress-only tool, no support for other CMS platforms
Premium pricing is not published on the plugin's WordPress.org listing

faqs.question: Is LinkWhisper free?
faqs.answer: Yes, a free version is available on WordPress.org with AI link suggestions and orphan-page reporting; a paid Premium version adds bulk automation.

faqs.question: Does LinkWhisper detect broken links?
faqs.answer: Broken link detection and reporting is a Premium feature.

faqs.question: Which SEO plugins does LinkWhisper work with?
faqs.answer: It integrates with Yoast SEO, Rank Math, and other SEO plugins.

faqs.question: What languages does LinkWhisper support?
faqs.answer: The plugin supports 25+ languages, including English, Spanish, German, and French.

use_cases.title: Internal linking on autopilot
use_cases.description: Surfaces linking opportunities as content is written, without manual searching.

use_cases.title: Site-wide link audits
use_cases.description: Finds orphan pages and broken links across large sites.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is LinkWhisper?
paragraphs: LinkWhisper is a WordPress plugin that scans site content and uses AI to suggest relevant internal links, while also flagging orphan pages that have no internal links pointing to them.
A free version covers core AI link suggestions and orphan-page reporting; the Premium version adds bulk auto-linking, broken-link detection, and cross-site linking.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who LinkWhisper is for
paragraphs: LinkWhisper is built for WordPress bloggers and SEO teams who want to improve site structure through internal linking without manually auditing every page.

enrichment.short_description: Squirrly SEO is a WordPress plugin combining a live on-page SEO assistant with AI keyword research, schema tools, and AI answer-engine optimization.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Squirrly SEO is a WordPress plugin with live on-page SEO analysis, AI keyword research, schema markup, and AI answer-engine optimization.

features.title: Live Assistant
features.description: Scores content for on-page SEO in real time as you write.

features.title: AI keyword research
features.description: AI-powered keyword research with a monthly research quota per plan.

features.title: GEO/AEO tools
features.description: Audits and optimizes pages to be cited by AI answer engines like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews.

features.title: AI crawler control
features.description: Manages access for AI bots such as GPTBot, ClaudeBot, and PerplexityBot, and generates llms.txt files.

features.title: Schema builder
features.description: Built-in structured data support for FAQ, HowTo, Article, and Organization types.

features.title: SEO plugin migration
features.description: Supports migrating settings from Yoast, Rank Math, and SEOPress.

pros: Free plan available for a single website
30,000+ active installs and a 4.6/5 rating (679 reviews) on WordPress.org
Combines traditional SEO with AI-answer-engine optimization in one plugin
Compatible with Gutenberg, Elementor, Divi, and WooCommerce
cons: Free plan limited to 1 website, 1 focus page, and 5 AI keyword researches per month
Higher-usage tiers (Web Dev Kit, Business) needed for agency-level limits
WordPress-only plugin

faqs.question: Is Squirrly SEO free?
faqs.answer: Yes, a free plan covers 1 website with limited monthly keyword research and audits; paid plans start at $9.99/month.

faqs.question: What does the PRO plan include?
faqs.answer: $9.99/month for 5 websites, 25 focus pages, and 50 AI keyword researches per month.

faqs.question: Does Squirrly help with AI search visibility?
faqs.answer: Yes, it includes GEO/AEO tools intended to help pages get cited by AI answer engines like ChatGPT and Google AI Overviews.

faqs.question: Which page builders does it support?
faqs.answer: Gutenberg, Elementor, Divi, and WooCommerce.

use_cases.title: Real-time content scoring
use_cases.description: Gives on-page SEO feedback while writing in the WordPress editor.

use_cases.title: Multi-site agency SEO
use_cases.description: Manages SEO and AI-answer-engine optimization across client sites.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Squirrly SEO?
paragraphs: Squirrly SEO is a WordPress plugin built around a Live Assistant that scores content for on-page SEO in real time, paired with AI keyword research and schema/structured data tools.
It also includes GEO/AEO features aimed at helping pages get cited by AI answer engines such as ChatGPT and Google AI Overviews, alongside AI crawler management and llms.txt generation.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Squirrly SEO is for
paragraphs: Squirrly suits WordPress bloggers and agencies who want real-time on-page guidance plus newer AI-search-visibility tools in a single plugin.

enrichment.short_description: Dashword is a content SEO platform that builds data-driven content briefs, scores drafts for on-page optimization, and monitors published content's rankings.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Dashword builds SEO content briefs, scores drafts in real time, and monitors published articles for ranking and traffic drops.

features.title: Content brief builder
features.description: Compiles competitor outlines and keyword research into a content brief.

features.title: Real-time optimization scoring
features.description: Scores drafts against target keywords with real-time SEO feedback.

features.title: Keyword rank tracking
features.description: Tracks keyword rankings and sends weekly reports.

features.title: Content monitoring alerts
features.description: Sends automated alerts when published content's traffic underperforms.

features.title: Google Docs add-on
features.description: Brings optimization scoring directly into the Google Docs writing workflow.

features.title: AI writing
features.description: Startup plan includes 100k words of AI writing; Business plan includes unlimited AI writing.

pros: Free content report available without a credit card
Combines pre-publish optimization with post-publish rank monitoring
Google Docs integration fits existing writing workflows
No minimum contract; cancel anytime
cons: No ongoing free plan, only a single free report before paying
Starting price of $99/month is higher than some competing content-SEO tools
API access and SSO are reserved for the $349/month Business plan

faqs.question: Does Dashword have a free plan?
faqs.answer: There's no ongoing free plan, but new users can get one free content report without a credit card.

faqs.question: What's included in the Startup plan?
faqs.answer: $99/month for 30 content reports, 5 user seats, content briefs, and 100k words of AI writing.

faqs.question: What does the Business plan add?
faqs.answer: From $349/month, it adds 100 content reports, 10 seats, unlimited AI writing, bulk report creation, API access, and Single Sign-On.

faqs.question: Can I cancel anytime?
faqs.answer: Yes, there's no minimum contract, and you retain access to historical data after cancelling.

use_cases.title: Pre-publish content optimization
use_cases.description: Scores article drafts against target keywords before they go live.

use_cases.title: Content performance monitoring
use_cases.description: Flags published articles losing traffic or rankings.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Dashword?
paragraphs: Dashword is a content SEO platform that generates content briefs from competitor research, scores drafts in real time against target keywords, and monitors published articles for ranking or traffic drops.
Plans run monthly starting at $99/month for the Startup tier, with a Business tier from $349/month adding unlimited AI writing, API access, and SSO.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Dashword is for
paragraphs: Dashword is aimed at content marketing teams and agencies that need both pre-publish optimization guidance and ongoing monitoring of published content's SEO performance.

name: Topic
skip_reason: Official site (topic.ai) is unreachable via HTTPS — the domain now returns a certificate mismatch and resolves to a domain-parking service (park.io), indicating the domain has expired and the product page is no longer live, so no verifiable current facts could be gathered.

enrichment.short_description: GrowthBar is an AI SEO writing tool for keyword research, SERP-based content outlines, and competitor backlink/ad analysis, now operated by SEOptimer.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: GrowthBar is an AI SEO writing tool for keyword research, competitor analysis, and SERP-based content outlines and writing.

features.title: AI content generation
features.description: Generates blog post outlines and drafts based on analysis of top-ranking Google search results.

features.title: Keyword research
features.description: Keyword suggestion database with difficulty scores and estimated value metrics.

features.title: Competitive intelligence
features.description: Shows competitors' keyword rankings, backlinks, and Google Ads data.

features.title: Chrome extension
features.description: Browser extension for in-editor WordPress writing and quick keyword lookups.

features.title: Brand voice training
features.description: Can train a custom AI model on a brand's existing content.

features.title: Team collaboration
features.description: Supports multi-user drafting and editing of content.

pros: 7-day free trial available
Combines keyword research, competitor analysis, and AI writing in one tool
Chrome extension speeds up in-browser research and writing
cons: No permanent free plan
AI article and paragraph generation are capped per plan (25 articles/month on Standard)
Was acquired by SEOptimer and is being integrated into that platform, which may bring future changes to the standalone product

faqs.question: Is GrowthBar free?
faqs.answer: There's no permanent free plan; it offers a 7-day free trial, with paid plans starting at $36/month.

faqs.question: What does the Standard plan include?
faqs.answer: $36/month for 25 AI articles, 500 AI paragraphs, and 2 user accounts.

faqs.question: Has GrowthBar been acquired?
faqs.answer: Yes, GrowthBar was acquired by SEOptimer and is being integrated into SEOptimer's platform while continuing to operate as a standalone subscription product.

faqs.question: Does GrowthBar have a browser extension?
faqs.answer: Yes, a Chrome extension is available for WordPress writing and keyword research.

use_cases.title: SEO content writing
use_cases.description: Generates SERP-informed outlines and drafts for blog content.

use_cases.title: Competitor keyword research
use_cases.description: Analyzes competitors' keyword rankings, backlinks, and ad data.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is GrowthBar?
paragraphs: GrowthBar is an AI SEO writing tool that generates content outlines and drafts based on analysis of top-ranking Google results, alongside keyword research and competitor backlink/ad data.
GrowthBar was acquired by SEOptimer and its marketing site now redirects to a page on seoptimer.com, though it continues to operate as a standalone subscription product during the transition.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who GrowthBar is for
paragraphs: GrowthBar suits bloggers, marketers, and agencies who want AI-assisted content writing paired with keyword and competitor research in one tool.

enrichment.short_description: Taplio is an AI-powered LinkedIn growth platform for writing, scheduling, and analyzing posts, plus engagement and outreach tools, built by Lemlist.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Taplio is an AI LinkedIn growth tool for writing posts, scheduling, analytics, and engagement, built by the makers of Lemlist.

features.title: AI post writing
features.description: AI-assisted writing and idea generation for LinkedIn posts.

features.title: Post scheduling
features.description: Automated queuing of posts at chosen times.

features.title: Analytics
features.description: Performance tracking and engagement analysis for published posts.

features.title: Content inspiration
features.description: Library of trending LinkedIn posts available to remix for ideas.

features.title: Carousel generator
features.description: Converts content into swipeable LinkedIn carousel posts.

features.title: Engagement automation
features.description: Automated connection requests, direct messaging, and engagement recommendations.

features.title: MCP integration
features.description: Integrates with Claude, ChatGPT, and other AI systems via MCP.

pros: 7-day free trial with full Pro access and no feature restrictions
Built by Lemlist (lempire), an established sales-engagement company
Combines writing, scheduling, analytics, and outreach in one LinkedIn tool
MCP support for integrating with AI assistants
cons: No permanent free plan
Automated connection requests and DMs may run against LinkedIn's own automation policies
Focused solely on LinkedIn, with no support for other social networks

faqs.question: Does Taplio have a free plan?
faqs.answer: No permanent free plan; it offers a 7-day free trial with full Pro access.

faqs.question: How much does Taplio cost?
faqs.answer: Plans start at $39/month.

faqs.question: Who makes Taplio?
faqs.answer: Taplio is built by Lemlist (lempire).

faqs.question: Can Taplio integrate with AI assistants?
faqs.answer: Yes, via MCP integration with Claude, ChatGPT, and other AI systems.

use_cases.title: Personal brand growth
use_cases.description: Helps individuals write and schedule consistent LinkedIn content.

use_cases.title: Sales and agency outreach
use_cases.description: Combines content creation with automated LinkedIn networking.

use_cases.title: Employee advocacy
use_cases.description: Supports company employee-advocacy content programs on LinkedIn.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Taplio?
paragraphs: Taplio is an AI-powered platform focused on LinkedIn growth, offering AI-assisted post writing, scheduling, analytics, and a library of trending posts for inspiration.
It also includes engagement automation (connection requests, DMs), a carousel generator, and MCP integration so AI assistants like Claude and ChatGPT can interact with the platform.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Taplio is for
paragraphs: Taplio is built for personal-brand creators, sales teams, agencies, and employee-advocacy programs that want to grow a consistent LinkedIn presence.

enrichment.short_description: Hypefury is a social media scheduling and automation tool that lets creators write once and cross-post to LinkedIn, Instagram, Threads, Bluesky, and more.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Hypefury schedules and automates social posts across LinkedIn, Instagram, Threads, and Bluesky, with auto-repost and engagement tools.

features.title: Cross-platform publishing
features.description: Write once and publish adapted versions to Instagram, LinkedIn, and other networks.

features.title: Auto-repost and auto-unpost
features.description: Automatically reposts evergreen content and removes old posts to keep feeds current.

features.title: Autoplugs
features.description: Auto-comments that promote a newsletter or product on high-performing posts.

features.title: Content inspiration templates
features.description: Library of templates and top-performing posts across 15+ niches.

features.title: Engagement builder
features.description: Tools for targeted engagement with relevant accounts.

features.title: Analytics
features.description: Tracks post performance with options to rewrite or requeue posts.

features.title: AI content assistance
features.description: AI trained on the user's own past posts to help generate new content.

pros: Single, simple pricing plan starting at $6/month
7-day free trial, no credit card required
Supports Bluesky, Threads, LinkedIn, and Instagram
Endorsed by known creators including Justin Welsh, Dickie Bush, and Ali Abdaal
cons: No free plan, only a paid trial
No longer supports posting to X (Twitter)
TikTok support is still listed as in progress

faqs.question: Does Hypefury have a free plan?
faqs.answer: No; it offers a 7-day free trial (no credit card required) before billing starts at $6/month.

faqs.question: Does Hypefury support X (Twitter)?
faqs.answer: No, Hypefury no longer supports X.

faqs.question: What platforms does Hypefury support?
faqs.answer: Bluesky, Threads, LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok (in progress), plus email lists and Gumroad.

faqs.question: What languages is Hypefury available in?
faqs.answer: English, French, Spanish, and Portuguese.

use_cases.title: Cross-platform audience building
use_cases.description: Automates repurposing and posting content across multiple networks.

use_cases.title: Newsletter and product promotion
use_cases.description: Uses autoplugs to promote a newsletter or product on top-performing posts.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Hypefury?
paragraphs: Hypefury is a social media scheduling and automation tool that lets creators write a post once and automatically adapt and cross-post it to networks like Instagram, LinkedIn, Threads, and Bluesky.
It adds automation on top of scheduling, including auto-repost/auto-unpost, autoplugs for promoting a newsletter or product, and an engagement builder for targeted interactions.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Hypefury is for
paragraphs: Hypefury is aimed at solo content creators and newsletter or product creators who want to grow an audience across multiple networks with less manual posting work.

enrichment.short_description: Typefully is a social media writing and scheduling tool supporting X, LinkedIn, Threads, Bluesky, Mastodon, and Instagram, with an API and AI-agent integrations.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Typefully is a writing and scheduling tool for X, LinkedIn, Threads, Bluesky, Mastodon, and Instagram, with API and AI-agent support.

features.title: Draft writing
features.description: Distraction-free drafting for social posts before scheduling.

features.title: Multi-platform scheduling
features.description: Schedules and publishes posts across X, LinkedIn, Threads, Bluesky, Mastodon, and Instagram.

features.title: Analytics
features.description: Tracks post performance across connected platforms.

features.title: API access
features.description: Public, documented API with an OpenAPI specification for integrations.

features.title: MCP server support
features.description: MCP server support lets AI agents interact with Typefully for automated workflows.

pros: Supports six networks (X, LinkedIn, Threads, Bluesky, Mastodon, Instagram) from one tool
Documented public API for custom integrations
MCP server support for AI-agent-driven workflows
cons: Pricing details are not published in a statically readable form on the marketing site
Founding year and headquarters are not publicly stated on the site

faqs.question: Which platforms does Typefully support?
faqs.answer: X, LinkedIn, Threads, Bluesky, Mastodon, and Instagram.

faqs.question: Does Typefully have an API?
faqs.answer: Yes, it provides a public, documented API with an OpenAPI specification.

faqs.question: Can AI agents use Typefully?
faqs.answer: Yes, Typefully supports MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers and public agent skills for AI-agent workflows.

use_cases.title: Multi-network content publishing
use_cases.description: Drafts, schedules, and analyzes posts across several social networks from one place.

use_cases.title: Automated posting workflows
use_cases.description: Builds custom or AI-agent-driven posting workflows via the API and MCP support.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Typefully?
paragraphs: Typefully is a social media writing and scheduling tool that lets users draft, schedule, publish, and analyze posts across X, LinkedIn, Threads, Bluesky, Mastodon, and Instagram.
It offers a public, documented API and MCP server support, letting developers and AI agents automate posting workflows.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Typefully is for
paragraphs: Typefully suits content creators managing several social networks at once, as well as developers who want API or AI-agent access to their posting workflow.
